title: 【转载】普里戈津建议普京结束「特别军事行动」
meta_description: 【转载】普里戈津建议普京结束「特别军事行动」 - 新闻来源白俄反对派媒体charter97  The Ukrainian military continues to prepare for a major offensive, and are waiting for the moment when the...
meta_keywords: 转载,普里,戈津,建议,普京,结束,特别,军事,行动
contents:
新闻来源白俄反对派媒体charter97

The Ukrainian military continues to prepare for a major offensive, and are waiting for the moment when the ground becomes drier and the weather allows them to attack the enemy. The Russian occupiers understand this and are panicking. Founder of the Wagner PMC Yevgeny Prigozhin even began to demand from Head of the Russian Federation Vladimir Putin that he must announce the end of the war against Ukraine. He himself stated this in his article, Glavred reports.

Prigozhin said that Putin needs to put a “final point” in this “SMO”, since the occupiers have already “achieved the planned results”.

“For the authorities and for society as a whole, today it is necessary to put some kind of a final point in the SMO. The ideal option is to announce the end of the SMO, to inform everyone that Russia has achieved the results that it planned, and in a sense we have actually achieved them. We have ground a huge number of fighters of the Armed Forces of Ukraine and we can report to ourselves that the tasks of the SMO have been fulfilled,” said Prigozhin.

Prigozhin also spoke about the Ukrainian offensive and added that the Armed Forces of Ukraine were already ready for it. He does not rule out that the Russian invaders may lose to the Ukrainian military.

“Either the Armed Forces of Ukraine will be defeated in a fair fight, or Russia will lick its wounds, grow muscles and again tear its rivals in a fair fight. Therefore, I believe that the option of agreements is impossible for the future of Russia,” Prigozhin said.


上周末，普京总统的亲密战友、御用大厨、瓦格纳创始人普里戈津同志罕见发文，建议普京总统结束「特别军事行动」。普里戈津表示，特别军事行动的目标已经达成，伟大的俄罗斯军队已经几乎摧毁了乌克兰空军（题外话，不是1小时22分就摧毁了？），是时候结束特别军事行动了，否则乌克兰军力得到补充后，不排除俄军失败的可能性。

根据克宫听床学的不靠谱猜测，结合普里戈津同志近半年多次公开炮轰圣彼得堡州长与俄罗斯国防部，他的野望大概已是司马昭之心了。希望FSB同志们严加防范狼子野心的普里戈津，相信特别军事行动必将按计划进行。
